form.formComment: Lining up for just third start. At debut, second last in a small field at this track on February 20 over 1207m, 13 len behind Whisper Roar with 55.5kg at $5.60. Second-up 2nd in a small field at this track on March 19 over 1106m, 0.1 len behind The Markinater carrying 56kg at $19.90. This race is well within his grasp.

form.formComment: Raced two times to date. At long odds at debut, 2nd in a small field at this track on February 20 over 1207m, 1.0 len behind Whisper Roar carrying 55.5kg at $25.80. Last start set the pace for much of the race 3rd in a small field at this track on March 19 over 1106m, neck behind The Markinater with 56kg at $5.50. Should be right in the finish.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last preparation second in a small field at Parx January 7 over 1308m, 0.5 len behind Sams After Party carrying 56.5kg at $5.60. On debut ran last of 12 at Parx September 19 over 1308m, 19 len behind Mr Punctuality carrying 55.5kg at $45. Expected to prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last preparation third of 12 at Parx October 10 2023 over 1106m, 6 len behind Bartlett with 54kg at $1.90. On debut second of 10 at Parx August 21 2023 over 1106m, 3 len behind Gamboling Ghost carrying 53.5kg at $18.10. Will take a lot from this run but stays under notice.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign fourth in a small field at this track December 12 over 1710m, 28 len behind Happy Offering carrying 56kg at $39.30. form.formComment: Was well in the market at debut, 3rd in a small field at this track on February 20 over 1207m, 1.1 len behind Whisper Roar with 55.5kg at $4.60. Encouraging effort on debut and another big run is on the cards.

form.formComment: Five-year-old gelding by Hoppertunity out of Iris Dancer who has taken a long time to make it to the track. This looks a tricky race for him.
